_note: Downloadable-pack sha256/sizeBytes are computed over the EXACT bytes the download path fetches: `${baseUrl}/<lang>.traineddata.gz` (tessdata_fast mirror, 4.0.0_fast). Computed 2026-05-28 (David, B-21.1) via fetch + node:crypto sha256 over the gz bytes; the language-pack-manager verifies this SHA-256 of the downloaded .gz before install (language-pack-manager.ts:339). NOTE: the BUNDLED `eng` pack is a DIFFERENT artifact — it ships from the npm package @tesseract.js-data/eng@4.0.0/4.0.0/eng.traineddata.gz (10.9MB), NOT from the 4.0.0_fast CDN (1.98MB). Its sha256 (ed350f37...) is the npm-package hash and is correct as-is; bundled packs resolve via file-existence, not hash, so eng is never verified against the CDN value. Regenerate downloadable SHAs at release via the procedure in ocr-engine.md §4.7 (fetch each URL, sha256 the gz bytes).
